name: excalidraw-render
description: Self-contained render script: converts Excalidraw JSON to PNG

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p node_modules/canvas && echo '{"name":"canvas","version":"2.11.2","main":"index.js","description":"Alias for @napi-rs/canvas — see postinstall in parent package.json"}' > node_modules/canvas/package.json && echo 'module.exports = require("@napi-rs/canvas");' > node_modules/canvas/index.js
